chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2967 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Priority. 1. For orders on Office Objection No.1. 2. For hearing of Misc. No.13096/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.01.2026. Mr. Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, Advocate for the Respondent No.3. ----- Learned counsel for the Petitioner states under instructions that the Petition has become infructuous, hence the same is not being pressed any further. In view of such statement, the Petition stands dismissed accordingly alongwith other Miscellaneous Application. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
